/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:DEFENDANT ARRIVED LATE TO COURT,  THE BENCH WARRANT ISSUED IN THE MORNING HAS BEEN RECALLED/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/SAWD/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORINGBY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORINGDEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT IMMEDIATELY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/INTC/X:(LOVE WAIVER)/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN FTA PHC 01-19-22/X:LOVE WAIVER/BWDNC/INTR/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PHC (TO SET)/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED ANDCONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED ANDSTAYED TO 01-12-22/X: BAIL SET AT $15,000/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/INTC/BWDNC/X:LOVE WAIVER STATUS/ACM/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORINGBY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORINGDEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALLINSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:DEFENDANT IS TO CHECK IN 3X PER WEEK/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/INTC/BWDNC/X: LOVE WAIVER/CTORD: THIS CASE IS REFERRED TO CJC FOR ASSESSMENT/CONTD: CJC ASSESSMENT ON 07-27-21 AT 8:30 A,M, M08/DOP/
/CAL: CJC REFERRAL/X:JUDGE MICHAEL BEGERT APPEARING VIA ZOOM/NTW60/LD:01-19-21/OR/CONTD: CJC REASSESSMENT REPORT/DOP/X: 12--09-20 COURT DATE IN M11 IS CONFIRMED/
